title: justicia cochinchinensis
intro: Justicia cochinchinensis, also known as Belsam apple or Thai balsam, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible fruit. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Justicia cochinchinensis have been associated with health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve infusions of the leaves or roots, which can be used as teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
